name: meta-ads-report-analyst
description: Pulls Meta Ads performance data, computes KPIs (CPL, CTR, frequency, CPM), classifies campaigns as Winner/Watchlist/Loser, detects creative fatigue and audience saturation, and delivers structured weekly performance reports with data-backed recommendations.
author: Carisma
allowed-tools: Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, Task, ToolSearch
